title: ConfigurationPlasticRuleTable Object
description: Represents a configuration table that defines different plastic rules.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Clears the content of the plastic rule table, removes the reference from the top table, and hides it in the user interface.

methods.name: getCell
methods.description: Returns the cell at the specified row and column.

properties.name: columns
properties.description: Returns the collection that provides access to the columns in this table.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Returns the unique ID of this table.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Returns the name of the table as seen in the user interface.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: parentTableColumn
properties.description: Returns the column in the top table that references this plastic rule table.

properties.name: rows
properties.description: Returns the rows (configurations) defined for this table and provides the functionality to create new rows.

classType.title: ConfigurationPlasticRuleTable.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

clear.title: ConfigurationPlasticRuleTable.clear Method
clear.description: Clears the content of the plastic rule table, removes the reference from the top table, and hides it in the user interface.

getCell.title: ConfigurationPlasticRuleTable.getCell Method
getCell.description: Returns the cell at the specified row and column.

parameters.name: column
parameters.description: The index of the column the cell is in. An index of 0 is the first column and does not include the name column.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: The index of the row the cell is in. An index of 0 is the first row and does not include the header row.
